title: Tanacetum paropamisicum
taxonomy: Tanacetum paropamisicum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Tanacetum, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as tansy. The plant is native to Afghanistan and is closely related to other Tanacetum species found in the region. Tanacetum paropamisicum is further classified as a member of the subgenus Tanaceteae, which includes various species of tansy and related plants. The classification of Tanacetum paropamisicum reflects its close relationship to other tansy species found in the western Himalayas and surrounding regions.
